mapper.sql: SELECT MAX(candidate.submissionId) AS submissionId, candidate.resourceId FROM resourceSubmission candidate JOIN ( SELECT resourceId, MAX(versionNo) AS versionNo FROM resourceSubmission GROUP BY resourceId ) latestVersion ON latestVersion.resourceId = candidate.resourceId AND latestVersion.versionNo = candidate.versionNo GROUP BY candidate.resourceId
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resource r JOIN (
) latestSubmission ON latestSubmission.resourceId = r.id WHERE r.status = 'Pending Review'

SELECT submission.submissionId, r.id AS resourceId, submission.versionNo, r.title, r.contributorId, contributor.username AS contributorName, c.categoryId, c.categoryTopic, submission.submittedAt, r.status AS resourceStatus FROM resource r JOIN (
) latestSubmission ON latestSubmission.resourceId = r.id JOIN resourceSubmission submission ON submission.submissionId = latestSubmission.submissionId JOIN `user` contributor ON contributor.userId = r.contributorId JOIN category c ON c.categoryId = r.categoryId WHERE r.status = 'Pending Review' ORDER BY submission.submittedAt DESC, submission.submissionId DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT submission.submissionId, submission.resourceId, submission.versionNo, submission.submittedBy, submission.submittedAt, submission.submissionNote, submission.statusSnapshot, r.contributorId, contributor.username AS contributorName, r.title, r.description, r.copyright AS copyrightDeclaration, r.categoryId, c.categoryTopic, r.resourceTypeId, rt.typeName AS resourceType, r.place, r.previewImage, r.mediaUrl, r.status AS resourceStatus, r.reviewedAt, r.createdAt, r.updatedAt, latestSubmission.submissionId AS latestSubmissionId, latestVersion.versionNo AS latestVersionNo FROM resourceSubmission submission JOIN resource r ON r.id = submission.resourceId JOIN (
) latestSubmission ON latestSubmission.resourceId = r.id JOIN resourceSubmission latestVersion ON latestVersion.submissionId = latestSubmission.submissionId JOIN `user` contributor ON contributor.userId = r.contributorId JOIN category c ON c.categoryId = r.categoryId JOIN resourceType rt ON rt.resourceTypeId = r.resourceTypeId WHERE submission.submissionId = #{submissionId}

SELECT rr.reviewRecordId, rr.resourceId, rr.submissionId, rr.versionNo, rr.reviewerId, reviewer.username AS reviewerName, rr.actionDescription, rr.status, rr.feedbackComment, rr.reviewedAt FROM reviewRecord rr LEFT JOIN `user` reviewer ON reviewer.userId = rr.reviewerId WHERE rr.resourceId = #{resourceId} ORDER BY COALESCE(rr.reviewedAt, rr.createdAt) ASC, rr.reviewRecordId ASC
